title: Wrangler commands
excerpt: description: Use Wrangler CLI commands to create, manage, and query D1 databases. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. D1 Wrangler commands use REST APIs to interact with the control plane. This page lists the Wrangler commands for D1. Creates a new D1 database, and provides the binding and UUID that you will put in your config file
